description_for_model: Use this plugin for PubMed searches, article metadata, and abstract retrieval when a user asks for peer-reviewed biomedical literature.

functions.name: search_pubmed_articles
functions.description: Search PubMed for biomedical articles relevant to a disease area, modality, or scientific question.

query.description: Search phrase or Boolean query to submit to PubMed.

max_results.description: Maximum number of articles to return.

published_after.description: Optional ISO date used to filter recent studies.

returns.description: Structured response from the remote MCP server.

functions.name: get_pubmed_article_abstract
functions.description: Retrieve the abstract for a specific PubMed record by PMID.

returns.description: Structured response from the remote MCP server.

functions.name: get_pubmed_article_details
functions.description: Retrieve structured metadata for a specific PubMed record, including journal, authors, and DOI when available.

returns.description: Structured response from the remote MCP server.

tools.name: search_pubmed_articles
tools.description: Search PubMed for biomedical articles relevant to a disease area, modality, or scientific question.

published_after.description: Optional ISO date used to filter recent studies.

tools.description: Retrieve the abstract for a specific PubMed record by PMID.
